summary: Completed backend + frontend regression for USD symbol-first formatting and new Weekly Operations admin view on public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/App.js remains very large (~1700+ lines); split by feature modules (public pages, admin shell, admin views) to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
seed_data_creation: No explicit seed script created. Test bookings and logs continue to be generated through existing public/admin flows and prior regression tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL public endpoint. USD appears as $420/$6240 (not 420 US$) in landing/program/booking/dashboard and email-log content. Verified admin currency setting can switch to EUR and back; restored currency to USD at end. Confirmed separate admin nav/view for Vista semanal/Weekly Operations with week-grouped dog rows and required fields (dog, client, program, booking/payment/vaccination statuses). Existing reservations table still present and functional.
rca of the issue: No functional defects reproduced for requested enhancement scope. Initial zero-count observation for weekly operation cards was a timing/selector-read race during first UI run; re-check after explicit wait showed 16 week groups and dog rows rendering correctly.
